personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | Python, AWS, SQL & Data Warehousing

summary: Senior Data Engineer with deep experience building Python and SQL-driven data pipelines, cloud data platforms, and analytics-ready data warehouse solutions. Strong background in AWS data services, Redshift, Athena, S3, PySpark, dimensional modeling, data quality validation, and production troubleshooting across large-scale enterprise environments. Snowflake exposure through current self-study, with transferable experience from Redshift, Athena, Oracle, and warehouse modeling.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Built Python/Pandas ETL pipelines ingesting telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, transforming raw operational data into structured datasets for reporting, forecasting, and enterprise analysis.
Developed AWS-based data workflows using S3 landing zones, AWS Glue ETL, Athena querying, and Redshift-backed workloads to support scalable analytics and data processing.
Designed optimized Oracle schemas and reporting data models for historical retention, trend analysis, and executive-level capacity reporting.
Migrated heavy forecasting and analytics workloads from on-prem Oracle environments to Redshift-backed cloud processing, improving scalability for parallel data workloads.
Implemented data quality checks, validation workflows, and reporting logic to improve reliability, accuracy, and trust in production data outputs.
Troubleshot pipeline, query, and data quality issues across telemetry ingestion, warehouse processing, and reporting layers in a regulated banking environment.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Data-mined real-user performance metrics from Gomez Synthetic Monitoring to identify optimization opportunities and provide actionable recommendations to engineering teams.
Managed Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics monitoring for critical hospitality systems, supporting performance analysis, operational reporting, and reliability improvement.
Participated in AWS cloud migration planning by assessing monitoring readiness, operational data collection needs, and performance visibility gaps.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Built Perl/Ksh data extraction scripts for automated performance reporting, replacing manual weekly exports and improving recurring reporting reliability.
Designed dashboards, alerts, and SLA thresholds for enterprise monitoring data, supporting application and infrastructure teams with consistent operational visibility.
Managed large-scale CA APM environments with 4,000–6,000 instrumented agents, supporting high-volume telemetry collection and performance analysis.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Languages: Python, SQL, Java, C++, Perl, Ksh / Korn Shell Scripting
skills.Cloud & Data: AWS (S3, Glue, Athena, Redshift), Data Warehousing, Data Lakes, Data Marts, ETL/ELT, Data Modeling, Dimensional Modeling
skills.Tools & Infra: Airflow, Docker, Git, Streamlit, Linux/Unix, BMC TrueSight, AppDynamics, Dynatrace, CA APM

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed an AWS data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, Bedrock, and PySpark for scalable ETL processing, analytics-ready datasets, and warehouse-style reporting access. Optimized data storage with Parquet and Snappy to support efficient downstream querying and reporting.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Built Python/PySpark data pipelines and forecasting workflows to process large-scale capacity telemetry, validate data outputs, and surface infrastructure trends through Streamlit dashboards.
